parameters.formDescription: Upload a real estate exposé PDF to extract structured property data and location enrichment.

parameters.content:
## README
- Owner: Richard Berenczei / richard.berenczei@pwc.com
- Dependencies: Form Trigger, BIG - Expose Processing Core sub-workflow
- Logic Summary: Accept a manual PDF upload, normalize the payload, and hand off to the shared extraction core.

## Trigger / Input
Blue section: operator-facing upload entry point for ad hoc processing and smoke tests.

## Success Path
Green section: normalize uploaded form data into the shared contract and dispatch to the processing core.
